name: Kick the Boss's Ass
short_description: Collect items and defeat the annoying boss!
detailed_description:
The boss is a dictator? Colleagues are scheming against each other? Clients are always being difficult?

Are you ready to embark on a epic battle? [/b]


Release the stress of work in "Beat Your Boss"!


Experience the elements of roguelikes with different combinations of dozens of styles,
try combining different weapon affinities, purchase items to enhance your characters,
and navigate through the office, enjoying the satisfying feeling of mowing down enemies in combat.

A workplace-themed independent game that brings you the joy of bullet hell games!
=====================================================================
Dear player:


Thank you for your enthusiastic support and participation in our game. If you are satisfied with our game, we sincerely invite you to add it to your wishlist.
Your support will be our driving force for continuously creating excellent games, so that more players can share our joy and excitement.


If you have any opinions or suggestions, please join our group chat and chat with us casually (*^▽^*)
QQ group: 362056093


Once again, thank you for your support and love of our game. We look forward to exploring more wonderful and amazing game worlds with you!
Have a great time playing!

[Fantasy Time Studio]
